full_description: Habit Tracker is an app designed to help users track and maintain their daily habits. It allows users to set and monitor their progress towards their goals, providing a clear overview of their daily routines. With Habit Tracker, users can create custom habits, set reminders, and track their progress over time. The app also includes features such as habit categorization, progress charts, and customizable notifications. Whether you're looking to start a new exercise routine, read more books, or simply drink more water, Habit Tracker is the perfect tool to help you stay on track and achieve your goals.
